feed.title: SAP Community - ABAP Development
feed.subtitle: ABAP Development Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: LSMW BUS6035
entry.content:
Hi gurus,

I am trying to post document through BUS6035 and I am not able to post multiple documents. I have ZHDR and ZITM source structures set up for my upload, but I am not able to do it if there are more than record. How do I do it? 

for Example the structures

IDENTIFIER COMP_CODE DOC_DATE PSTNG_DATE HEADER_TXT USERNAME DOC_TYPE
H 9000 20150101 20150101 test sap1 ab

IDENTIFIER ITEMNO_ACC GL_ACCOUNT AMT_DOCUR ITEM_TEXT TRADE_ID PROFIT_CTR WBS_ELEMENT ORDERID COSTCENTER FUN_AREA_LONG CURRENCY
I 1 0031001500 555 test1 0000002100 USD
I 2 0031001500 -555 test1 0000002200 USD

Upload file with one record. This is working

H 9000 20150101 20150101 test sap1 ab
I 1 0031001500 555 test1 2100 USD
I 2 0031001500 -555 test1 2200 USD

Upload file with two records.

H 9000 20150101 20150101 test sap1 ab
I 1 0031001500 555 test1 2100 USD
I 2 0031001500 -555 test1 2200 USD

H 9000 20150101 20150101 test sap1 ab
I 1 0031001500 555 test1 2100 EUR
I 2 0031001500 -555 test1 2200 EUR

This is not working. I need to post two separate documents for this.

entry.title: Extending Custom RAP App
entry.content:
Hello SAP RAP experts,

I am working on a custom RAP application and I have two requirements I want to implement. I would like your advice on whether they are feasible, especially considering that I only have Web IDE access and not BAS.

Requirement 1 :

Add a Send Mail button on the main page of the app.

The button should not send the email immediately. Instead, it should open a popup/dialog showing an editable email template with: Subject - Sender - Body - Attachments ..., the user can then either click Send to send the email or cancel to discard it.

Requirement 2:

Add an action button (or icon) in each line of the table (line item), when clicked, the user should see a list of attachments related to the PO for that line, and be able to open/view them.

My main question: I know that something like this might be done using a UI5 extension, but all examples I have found require BAS. Since I only have Web IDE access, I’m not sure if it’s possible to implement these enhancements.

I would really appreciate any guidance, suggestions, or best practices for this scenario.

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Delivery Locked on Auto Invoice via BAPI
entry.content:
Hello SAP experts,

We have a business requirement to automatically create an invoice when posting a goods issue in VL02N.

The invoice creation itself works fine. However, when we try to link it to the delivery flow via a BAPI, the system returns 'Delivery Locked'.

This seems expected because a customized output type (with a special function type) is triggered immediately when posting the goods issue. At that moment, the standard system behavior temporarily locks the delivery, preventing the BAPI from updating the delivery document flow with the invoice.

This issue is blocking my process. Any guidance, best practices, or workarounds to handle this scenario would be highly appreciated.

Thank you!

entry.title: IDocs vs Event-Driven Integration in SAP
entry.content: We are currently using IDocs for system integration in SAP and are exploring the possibility of moving to an event-driven architecture using SAP Event Mesh. How can IDocs be replaced with events in such a scenario, and what are the recommended best practices for implementing event-driven integration in SAP?

entry.title: ABAP error "Too many parameters specified with PERFORM" for new Purchase order output type
entry.content:
Hello everyone!

Could you please help me with output determination for EF (Purchase order) application.
Business requirement is to print customized document from purchase order (PO Type is goods movement from one plant to another). For this, I have created new output type ZRZN and configured all necessary configurations: access sequence (by purchase doc type), input program and form routine, set new control parameters to procedure RMBEF1, set PO doc type to my output form, configured Fine tuned control for purchase order. Output type is assigning automatically when i create PO. But when I press Print preview ABAP programming error occurs.

entry.title: SAP BTP subaccount D81 credentials are not working
entry.content: I’m having issues with one of your courses. In the course: Acquiring Core ABAP Skills: https://share.percipio.com/cd/rmOuj6COt, first section: Preparing the Development Environment. There's a Demo with the step-by-step how to Create an ABAP Cloud Project (logon to the SAP BTP ABAP Environment), and credentials were provided to logon to SAP BTP subaccount D81 (user: TRAIN-00 password: welcome) but these credentials are not working for me, I tried accessing in an incognito window and also deleting cache but still not working.

entry.title: Delete repository objects from non existent namespace
entry.content:
Hi,

we have old 3rd party software on our system that we no longer use and want to remove. The software producer was not able to provide assistance so I'm trying to remove it manually. 

The problem I'm facing now is, the software seems to be in an obscure namespace that is not present on the system and that cannot be created either.

When I try to delete an object in the following package I get an error:

When I try to add the namespace in transaction SE03 I get a warning at first followed by an error:

Via debugging I found out, that the valid key range needs to be a "/" followed by a letter.

Can anybody provide an inside into how to best proceed here?

A last ditch effort might be to change the namespace of the package in table TDEVC but that seems risky and I have no idea if it would even work.

Kind regards,
Christian

entry.title: ABAP in Eclipse logon requesting credentials repeatedly
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

I am experiencing a persistent login loop when trying to use ABAP Development Tools (ADT) in Eclipse.

The Issue:

When Eclipse triggers the logon prompt, it redirects me to the browser. However, the logon page refuses to sign me in. When I enter my username and password, the page simply refreshes without logging me in.

What I have observed:

  • If I try to log in using my username, I receive the error:
    "We couldn't authenticate you."

  • However, if I log in using my email address with the same password, it works successfully.

  • This setup was working perfectly until today. Previously, I was not prompted for browser login at all.

Steps already taken:

  1. Cleared browser cache and cookies.

  2. Reset SAP password.

  3. Tried different browsers.

Despite these steps, the issue persists in Eclipse. It seems like the ADT logon window is rejecting the credentials or failing the authentication handshake.

Has anyone encountered this recently in ADT?

Any guidance would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: Where is "Z_I_BOOKING_000" defined?
entry.content: Enhance an ABAP Core Data Services (CDS) View in SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP) ABAP Environment − Step 9 Specify hierarchy − Where is "Z_I_BOOKING_000" defined in 1.? Also, where should "define view" be defined in 6.?

entry.title: Can't create package in ZLOCAL in shared instance SAP BTP Free Trail
entry.content:
Ignore the question - I found solution, I just have updated my ADT tool to last version and issue is gone.

Hi, Colleagues,

I have just executed booster 'Prepare Account for ABAP Trail' and logged into system via Eclipse. I can't create subpackage under ZLOCAL.  The button 'Finish' is disabled and when I try to hit the button 'Next', I just stay on the same screen and no errors are got. 

Trail in US region:

I see others packages are adding, but I can't create. Any help, colleagues?

entry.title: Dump MOVE_TO_LIT_NOTALLOWED_NODATA in SAP CRM side
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

When the data is sent from ECC to CRM for the business partner...system end up with dump as below in CRM side.

I have just extended the standard structure BUS_EI_EXTERN with some additional fields with STRING format in both ECC and CRM side.

It ends up with generic error and can i know how to fix it.

Observed that in standard code as below runs if the structure holds the STRING format.

I have changed the same to CHAR on the additional fields that i have created. Is there any additional stuff which i need to take care ?

Dump happen in below statement :

Initial loop statement where logic starts:

Regards,

Karthik S

entry.title: Appending line to XVBEP to create new entry in Schedule Line does not work.
entry.content:
Result:

Context: I have a custom field VBAK-ZCON_HARD_DEADLINE_DATE, which I intend to pass to the delivery date field in Schedule Line tab. 

However, in this situation, there is no existing line in Schedule Line. So what I did, I append a line to XVBEP. My code goes like this:

APPEND VALUE #(...) TO XVBEP.

entry.title: Production Order Confirmation Posts Successfully but GI 261 Is Not Created via EML.
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

 

We are using EML on I_ProductionOrdConfirmationTP to post a production order confirmation together with goods movement data through the child entity _ProdnOrdConfMatlDocItm. The confirmation is created successfully, but the 261 Goods Issue (MIGO equivalent) is not posted, and no backend error is returned.

Has anyone faced this situation where the confirmation BO processes correctly but does not generate the expected GI 261? Is there any specific prerequisite or RAP BO limitation that prevents the 261 movement from being created in this scenario?

 

Thank you.

entry.title: custom field value is not updating in "Manage sales order" Fiori app
entry.content:
Hello Team,

I am using SAP S4 hana 2023 on-prem system. I have created one custom filed "Comments" in standard Fiori app "Manage Sales Order version 2" using custom field Fiori app.
Now my requirement is when user will update value in "Comments" field of 1st line item, then same value will be update in "Comments" field of second line item.

I have tried with Badi SD_SLS_MODIFY_ITEM, but its only updating 1st line item, not 2nd one.

I have also tried with extend BDEF I_SALESORDERTP, but in R_SalesOrderItemTP is not allowing to add determination on custom filed "Comments".


Can you please help me on this how to solve ?

 

Thanks

entry.title: Custom BSEG Field Filled via OBBH Substitution but Not Visible in FBL1N ALV
entry.content:
Question
I added a custom field to table BSEG via append structure:


ZZCUSTOMFIELD (CHAR20)

The table was activated successfully.

Then I configured a substitution in OBBH:

Application Area: FI

Callup Point: 2 (Line Item)

Company Code: 1000

Substitution: ZFI_BK

Inside the substitution:

Created a step

Assigned field: BSEG-ZZCUSTOMFIELD

Substitution type: Constant

Value: 'LIBRARY'

Prerequisite: TRUE

Substitution was generated successfully.

Testing
Posted a new vendor document.

Checked BSEG via SE16N → field is correctly populated.

Extended the ALV layout in FBL1N to include ZZCUSTOMFIELD.

Issue
Although:

The field exists in BSEG

The substitution fills the field correctly

The value is stored in the database

The value does not appear in FBL1N ALV output, even after adding the field to the layout.

Question
Is there any additional configuration required to make an append field from BSEG visible in FBL1N?

Does FBL1N require:

Logical database enhancement?

Structure enhancement (e.g., RFPOSXEXT)?

BTE / implicit enhancement?

Field catalog adjustment?

What is the correct approach to display a custom BSEG append field in FBL1N?

entry.title: Transaction S_PL0_86000030: New Field Addition
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Need to add a new field in transaction S_PL0_86000030 report layout. As this is a report painter generated program, how to achieve the same?

entry.title: BEHAVIOR_ILLEGAL_STATEMENT error raising when Click Send Mail action but Mail can send
entry.content:
Dear All,

We have implemented a custom RAP action sendMail for business object ZI_PACKINGLISTAPP in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud. The logic is written in a custom class under Source Code Library and is executed from the RAP behavior. The action reads selected records using READ ENTITIES, creates an email using CL_BCS_MAIL_MESSAGE, sets recipient, subject, and HTML body, and then sends the email using lo_mail->send(). However, when the action is triggered from the Fiori app, the OData request fails with runtime error BEHAVIOR_ILLEGAL_STATEMENT althouthg the email is  sent. We would like to understand why this logic is not working in the RAP context and which part of the implementation is considered illegal by the RAP framework.

 

Below is the implemented logic for reference:

METHOD sendMail.
  READ ENTITIES OF zi_packinglistapp IN LOCAL MODE
    ENTITY PackingListApp
    ALL FIELDS WITH CORRESPONDING #( keys )
    RESULT DATA(lt_results).

  LOOP AT lt_results ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<fs_result>).
    DATA(lo_mail) = cl_bcs_mail_message=>create_instance( ).
    lo_mail->add_recipient( 'xxx@company.com' ).
    lo_mail->set_subject( 'Status Updated' ).
    lo_mail->set_main(
      cl_bcs_mail_textpart=>create_instance(
        iv_content = 'Notice Item ' &&
<fs_result>-OutboundDeliveryID &&  ' updated. '
        iv_content_type = 'text/html'
      )
    ).
    lo_mail->send( ).
  ENDLOOP.
ENDMETHOD.

Please clarify why this implementation results in BEHAVIOR_ILLEGAL_STATEMENT in S/4HANA Public Cloud RAP, and advise the correct SAP-recommended approach for sending emails (and adding attachments) triggered from a RAP action.

Thanks

entry.title: CDS-based Value Help: Company Code filter not prefilled from UI context (expected FR03)
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,
 
I created a custom field using the Custom Fields app (Key User Extensibility) in the business context Fixed Asset Master Data.
For value selection, I created a CDS-based value help using a consumption view entity with ObjectModel.dataCategory: VALUE_HELP.

Requirement
When the user opens the value help from the UI, the Company Code field in the value help dialog (restriction/filter area) should be automatically prefilled from the UI context.
Example: In the asset master screen, the Company Code is VR03, so the value help should open with Company Code = VR03 already set.

Actual behavior
The value help opens, but Company Code is empty in the restriction area, and the user has to manually enter VR03.
 
@AbapCatalog.viewEnhancementCategory: [#NONE]
@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED
@EndUserText.label: 'GL Local Dimension Assignment'
@Metadata.ignorePropagatedAnnotations: true
@VDM.viewType: #CONSUMPTION
@ObjectModel.dataCategory: #VALUE_HELP
@Search.searchable: true
@Consumption.ranked: true
@ObjectModel.modelingPattern: #VALUE_HELP_PROVIDER
define view entity YC_GLLOCALDIMENASSIGNVH
  as select from YI_GlLocalDimensionAssign
{
  @ObjectModel.foreignKey.association: '_CompanyCode'
  .defaultSearchElement: true
  key CompanyCode,

  @ObjectModel.text.association: '_Text'
  .defaultSearchElement: true
  key Assignment1,

  _Text,

  @Consumption.hidden: true
  _CompanyCode
}<br /><br />
Questions
How can I pass the UI context (Company Code) into a CDS-based value help created for a custom field?
Is there any annotation required (for example binding, filter mapping, or context inheritance) so the value help automatically uses the company code from the UI?
Is this context inheritance supported for Key User Extensibility custom fields, or do I need a different approach (for example a parameterized view, another value help type, or different extensibility mechanism)?
Any guidance or best practices would be highly appreciated.
Thank you

entry.title: Creating Number Range Objects in SAP BTP Trial Account?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I’m currently working in an SAP BTP Trial Account and I need to create and manage Number Range Objects for my application.

In on-premise SAP systems (like S/4HANA or ECC), we typically use transactions such as SNRO to create number range objects. However, I’m unsure how this is handled in the SAP BTP Trial environment.

Specifically, I would like to understand:

  • Is it possible to create Number Range Objects directly in SAP BTP Trial?

  • Are there any trial account limitations?

     

    Any guidance, documentation links, or examples would be greatly appreciated.

    Thanks in advance for your support.

entry.title: EU Access only in developer hub register
entry.content:
Hi Team 

It's possible to register under the Developer Hub but only considering EU access only ?

Many thanks

João
